notes: Art. 10 Sec. 5: Saturdays, Sundays and holidays are EXCLUDED from all time limits. These are workday counts. The deadline calculator skips weekends and the Kansas/federal holiday set defined in deadlines.py.

rules.name: Step 1 — File grievance with immediate supervisor (Art. 10 Sec. 2a)
rules.note: 10 workdays from notification of reprimand, suspension, demotion, or termination. Termination cases may skip to Step D.

rules.name: Step 2 — Forward to Transit Director (Art. 10 Sec. 2b)
rules.note: 10 workdays from receipt of Step 1 supervisor decision.

rules.name: Step 2 — Director must respond (Art. 10 Sec. 2b)
rules.note: 10 workdays from receipt of Step 2 grievance.

rules.name: Step 3 — Forward to Employee Relations Officer (Art. 10 Sec. 2c)
Step 4 — ERO decision (Art. 10 Sec. 2d)
rules.note: 15 workdays from receipt of employee's letter. ERO may request a 5-day extension verbally.

rules.name: Arbitration demand (Art. 10 Sec. 4)
rules.note: 10 days from receipt of the latest decision. If no demand is made, grievance is forever barred.
